svg.title: MFD Complete Data Architecture — All Files & Join Keys
svg.desc: Shows the complete join chain from BSE through CAMS and KFinTech with key column mappings
svg.text: LAYER 1 — BSE (source of truth for clients + SIPs)
↑ this = XSIP Regn No from BSE
Has AUM col (not in folio master)
Dashed arrows = BSE data flows to both RTAs via folio+PAN match
